name: ADSP File Service Integration
summary: Upload and manage files using ADSP File Service.

formIntegration.description: In ADSP forms, use format: 'file-urn' to enable file upload fields

directUploadPattern.description: For custom upload UI outside of forms

notes: Validate file types and sizes on client before upload
Store the returned URN, not the file content
Consider showing upload progress for large files
